name: Marvel RPG
description:
Chaos threatens the Multiverse. Villains have united, pushing the world's greatest defenders to their breaking point.

It is time for a new generation to rise. Whether you were born with power, forged by technology, or master of the mystic arts, your story begins now.

Explore iconic locations, team up with legends like Iron Man and Wolverine, and battle for the future.

The odds are impossible, the stakes are infinite, and the world is waiting. Suit up, hero, Villain—your legacy awaits.
creator: AllStar04
